$comment: Performance budget (feature 009-perf-budget / P1.8). Gzip KB limits on client JS weight, checked in CI by scripts/perf-budget.mjs. Set above today's real numbers so they guard growth, not fail on day one. Bump deliberately in a PR when a real increase is justified.

sharedFirstLoadJs.note: gzip of rootMainFiles + polyfillFiles from .next/build-manifest.json — the First Load JS shared by every page (current ~157 KB)

totalClientJs.note: gzip of every .next/static/chunks/*.js incl. deferred chunks like three.js (current ~611 KB)
